title: Antihelminthic drugs
body_html:
DrugMechanism of action
BendazolesBinds B-tubulin to inhibit its polymerization and microtubule assembly, also inhibits glucose uptake
PraziquantelIncreases permeability of the membranes towards calcium ions, causing muscle contration
IvermectinActivates glutamate-gated chloride channels, enhancing inhibitory neurotransmission
Pyrantel pamoateDepolarizing neuromuscular blocking agent
DiethylcarbamazineInhibits arachidonic acid metabolism
3
